weekly_decisions.question: The library is closed, do you want to take a taxi to a cafe in town?
The fire alarm in Agnes Blackadder Hall goes off at 3 AM. What do you do?

options.option_text: Stay in bed and risk it.
Grab your laptop to study outside.

weekly_decisions.question: You have a major Computer Science project due tomorrow, but your code is throwing endless errors.

options.option_text: Submit what you have and go to sleep.
Pay a tutor for emergency help.

weekly_decisions.question: The Pokemon society is hosting a local tournament, but you have a Physics quiz the next morning.

options.option_text: Skip the tournament, study for Physics.
Go to the tournament, wing the quiz.
Study for an hour, then go late.

weekly_decisions.question: Your flatmate is trying to cook Beef Galawati Kababs, but they don't know what they're doing.

options.option_text: Take over and cook for them.
Let them burn it, then order takeout together.
Hide in your room to study.

weekly_decisions.question: You started reading a new progression fantasy novel similar to Solo Leveling. It's 2 AM and you have class at 9 AM.
The Doctor Who society is doing a massive marathon of the classic era this weekend.

options.option_text: Just go for your favorite Doctor's episodes.
Stay home and work on your personal coding project.

weekly_decisions.question: You get invited to a weekend hiking trip in the highlands with the Breakaway society.

options.option_text: Pay the trip fee and go.

weekly_decisions.question: Dice society is starting an epic RPG campaign that requires a 5-hour weekly commitment.

options.option_text: Say you can only do occasional one-shots.

weekly_decisions.question: Sabrina Carpenter is playing a concert nearby, but tickets are incredibly expensive.

options.option_text: Skip it and listen on Spotify.

weekly_decisions.question: You're offered a part-time web development internship, but it takes 15 hours a week.

options.option_text: Accept it for the cash and experience.

weekly_decisions.question: The university Wi-Fi goes down for the entire evening during midterm season.

options.option_text: Give up and read a physical book.
Trek to a local pub with Wi-Fi.

weekly_decisions.question: You find a glowing rock on your way to class. It hums faintly.

options.option_text: Keep it as a desk ornament. It makes you feel smart.
Throw it in the river. Too spooky.

weekly_decisions.question: Your professor accidentally uploads the answers to tomorrow's exam instead of the study guide.

options.option_text: Email the professor to let them know.
Sell the answers to your coursemates.

weekly_decisions.question: You catch freshers' flu.

options.option_text: Rest and drink fluids all weekend.
Power through and go to class.
Buy expensive vitamins and herbal remedies.

weekly_decisions.question: A massive storm hits and all lectures are moved online for the week.

options.option_text: Treat it like a holiday and play video games.

weekly_decisions.question: You realize you've been doing the laundry wrong all year and all your clothes have shrunk.

options.option_text: Squeeze into them. It's a fashion statement.

weekly_decisions.question: A recruiter from a top tech firm messages you on LinkedIn.

options.option_text: Spend hours perfecting your resume and replying.

weekly_decisions.question: You accidentally join a cult that meets in the Student Union building.
You are drafted into World War 3.

options.option_text: Report for duty as a cyber-warfare specialist.
Claim you are a conscientious objector.

weekly_decisions.question: The dining hall is serving mystery meat.

options.option_text: Cook instant noodles in your dorm.

weekly_decisions.question: A stray cat wanders into your lecture hall and sits on your lap.

options.option_text: Pet it for the rest of the lecture.
Shoo it away so you can take notes.
Smuggle it back to your dorm.

weekly_decisions.question: Your laptop battery dies completely and you need a replacement.

options.option_text: Buy a brand new, high-end laptop.
Use the library computers for the rest of the semester.

weekly_decisions.question: You realize you forgot about an essay due in 3 hours.

options.option_text: Chug an energy drink and speed-write it.
Ask the professor for an extension.
Accept the late penalty and write it tomorrow.

weekly_decisions.question: A new bubble tea shop opens near campus with a buy-one-get-one-free offer.

options.option_text: Just go once with a friend.

weekly_decisions.question: You get a jury duty summons.

options.option_text: Serve on the jury. It sounds fun.

weekly_decisions.question: You find a wallet on the street with £100 inside.

options.option_text: Keep the cash, toss the wallet.
Turn it into the police station.

weekly_decisions.question: The university gym is offering a huge discount on yearly memberships.

options.option_text: Buy it and go every day.
Skip the gym, do home workouts.

weekly_decisions.question: A celebrity is filming a movie on campus and they need extras.

options.option_text: Skip class to be an extra.
Ignore it and go to class.

weekly_decisions.question: Your textbook for a module costs £150.

options.option_text: Buy it new from the bookstore.
Share a copy with a friend.

weekly_decisions.question: Aliens abduct you for 24 hours to study a 'typical university student'.

options.option_text: Teach them how to play beer pong.
Beg them to do your assignments.
Steal an alien artifact to sell.

weekly_decisions.question: Your parents make a surprise visit to see how you're doing.

options.option_text: Take them out for a nice dinner.
Hide because your room is a mess.

weekly_decisions.question: A massive snowstorm cancels all transport, and you are stuck in the library overnight.

options.option_text: Build a fort out of law textbooks.

weekly_decisions.question: You get a cold sore right before a big presentation.

options.option_text: Wear a mask and pretend you're sick.

weekly_decisions.question: A friend invites you to invest in a new cryptocurrency.
Your flatmate leaves dirty dishes in the sink for the 5th day in a row.

options.option_text: Put the dishes in their bed.

weekly_decisions.question: You are offered a trial for a new memory-enhancing drug by the psych department.
You get a 20% discount code for a food delivery app.

options.option_text: Ignore it and cook at home.

weekly_decisions.question: A massive protest happens on campus blocking your route to an exam.

options.option_text: Push your way through to the exam.

weekly_decisions.question: You discover a glitch in the university vending machine that gives free snacks.
Your favorite music artist drops a surprise album at midnight.

options.option_text: Stay up listening to the whole thing.
Go to sleep and listen tomorrow.

weekly_decisions.question: The university announces a zombie outbreak simulation game across campus.

options.option_text: Sign up and try to survive.
Play as a zombie and infect people.
Ignore it and go to the library.

weekly_decisions.question: You accidentally send an embarrassing text to your professor instead of your friend.
Elon Musk buys your university.
You win a year's supply of instant noodles.

options.option_text: Donate them to a food bank.

weekly_decisions.question: A pipe bursts in your dorm and floods the hallway.

options.option_text: Flee to a friend's place for the weekend.
Complain to the landlord for compensation.

weekly_decisions.question: Your crush asks you to 'study' together.
The local pub is hosting a trivia night with a big cash prize.

options.option_text: Assemble a genius team and compete.

weekly_decisions.question: You discover a hidden underground tunnel connecting the library to a coffee shop.
You realize you haven't eaten a vegetable in a week.
A chaotic bird flies into your dorm room and won't leave.
You get a sudden urge to reinvent yourself.

options.option_text: Dye your hair a crazy color.

weekly_decisions.question: Your bank account dips below £10.
The university is hosting a 'Puppy Therapy' day.
You accidentally plagiarize yourself from a high school paper.
Your flat decides to host a massive house party.

options.option_text: Hide in your room with noise-cancelling headphones.
Act as the bouncer and charge entry.

weekly_decisions.question: You find a USB drive labeled 'Exam Answers 2026'.
You sign up for a 9 AM class on a Friday.
A massive spider is blocking the door to the bathroom.

options.option_text: Catch it and put it outside.

weekly_decisions.question: You receive a phishing email offering a £10,000 scholarship.

options.option_text: Click the link and fill out the form.

weekly_decisions.question: The university opens a new rock-climbing wall.
You start a TikTok account reviewing university food.
Your alarm doesn't go off on the day of a major presentation.

options.option_text: Sprint to class in whatever you're wearing.

weekly_decisions.question: A time traveler appears and tells you to drop out to save the future.

options.option_text: Tell them to shut up, you have debt.

weekly_decisions.question: You are assigned a group project where no one else speaks English.
Your favorite cafe introduces a 'pay it forward' board.

options.option_text: Buy a coffee for a stranger.

weekly_decisions.question: You lose your student ID card right before an exam.

options.option_text: Beg the invigilator to let you in.

weekly_decisions.question: You accidentally join a pyramid scheme.
You find a rare, first-edition book in the university library.

options.option_text: Report the find to the librarian.

weekly_decisions.question: Your phone screen shatters completely.

options.option_text: Use it shattered and cut your fingers.

weekly_decisions.question: A massive stray dog follows you to your dorm.
You win £500 on a scratch card.
You are invited to a mysterious underground fight club.
Your dorm room gets infested with ants.

options.option_text: Buy bug spray and wage war.

weekly_decisions.question: You get a free trial for a premium study AI.

options.option_text: Use it to write all your essays.

weekly_decisions.question: A flash mob erupts in the middle of your lecture.
You accidentally shrink your favorite sweater.

options.option_text: Give it to a teddy bear.

weekly_decisions.question: A wealthy alum offers to pay off your tuition if you can beat them in chess.
You get locked out of your dorm in a towel.
The university coffee shop runs out of coffee beans.

options.option_text: Have a breakdown and sleep all day.

weekly_decisions.question: You discover a hidden talent for stand-up comedy.
You accidentally buy an expensive subscription to an online magazine.

options.option_text: Read it to justify the cost.

weekly_decisions.question: You find out your favorite professor is a secret agent.
Your roommate adopts a snake without telling you.

options.option_text: Demand they get rid of it.

weekly_decisions.question: A massive power outage hits the whole town.

options.option_text: Host a candlelit ghost story night.

weekly_decisions.question: You get a mysterious letter with no return address containing £50.
You accidentally sign up for a marathon.
A Hollywood director wants to film a scene in your dorm room.
You find a perfectly good couch on the sidewalk.

options.option_text: Leave it, it probably has bed bugs.

weekly_decisions.question: The university website crashes right when course registration opens.

options.option_text: Give up and take whatever classes are left.
